checks.evidence: Homepage states 'Plain is AI support infrastructure that enables B2B teams to build anything'. Docs and pricing confirm AI-first customer support platform for B2B.
Auth docs show API key via Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer plainApiKey_xxx). MCP docs show OAuth 2.0 with PKCE for MCP server authentication.
Pricing page shows 'Start today, no credit card required', '7 day free trial', Foundation plan $35/mo with API/Webhooks/Events checkmarks. Self-serve signup.

Docs intro confirms full GraphQL API at core-api.uk.plain.com/graphql/v1 with downloadable schema, 'no limitations' vs UI. Docs index shows customers, threads, companies, tenants, labels, messaging, webhooks, help center, and more. Webhooks section exists.

Official help article states 'Plain MCP server at https://mcp.plain.com/mcp' with 30 tools across threads, customers, tenants, help center, workspace. Uses OAuth. Setup guides for ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude.ai, Claude Code.

Public GraphQL API with full schema, official MCP server with 30 tools, self-serve API key access (free trial, no credit card), Foundation plan $35/mo with API included. All evidence supports buildable_today.
